{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Amalgam
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Amalgam]] is a standard, almost barren world within [[Sector]] 11.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
